entries.name: LLM Task
entries.description: Generic JSON-only LLM tool for structured tasks callable from workflows.

entries.name: afrexai-qa-testing-engine
entries.description: End-to-end QA and testing methodology for software projects (web, API, mobile, CLI). Use when defining test strategy, building test plans, setting coverage targets, executing QA workflows, or producing quality reports before release.

entries.name: agent-memory-system
entries.description: Unified memory management for OpenClaw workspaces. Use when logging session outcomes, organizing long-term knowledge, maintaining daily memory files, indexing memory, or applying memory hygiene workflows.

entries.name: anti-hallucination-guardrails
entries.description: Prevent speculative or incorrect technical claims. Use when answering questions about configuration, APIs, code behavior, runtime capabilities, security settings, infrastructure, or any factual statement that must be verifiable. Enforce evidence-first responses, clear uncertainty handling, and safe change workflow (backup -> minimal patch -> validation -> smoke test).

entries.name: audit
entries.description: Global guardrail audit for Trello hygiene, stale in-progress cards, and missing team memory updates. Use when running periodic compliance checks, operational guardrails, or explicit audit requests.

entries.name: browser-automation
entries.description: Use when controlling web pages with the OpenClaw browser tool, especially multi-step flows, login checks, tab management, or recovery from stale refs/timeouts.

entries.name: canvas
entries.description: Present HTML on connected OpenClaw node canvases, navigate/eval/snapshot, and debug canvas host URLs.

entries.name: clawhub
entries.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

entries.name: code-review
entries.description: Systematic code review patterns covering security, performance, maintainability, correctness, and testing — with severity levels, structured feedback guidance, review process, and anti-patterns to avoid. Use when reviewing PRs, establishing review standards, or improving review quality.

entries.name: content-critique
entries.description: Analisi critica automatica di testi tramite 3 agenti con ruoli diversi (Selection Committee, Developer Scettico, Organizzatore Evento). Usare quando si vuole ottenere feedback strutturato su abstract CFP, post LinkedIn, Agency Log, preventivi o qualsiasi testo prima di pubblicarlo. Produce un report sintetizzato con punti forti, punti deboli e 3 azioni prioritarie di miglioramento. Output opzionale: documento preformattato per NotebookLM (podcast di critica).

entries.name: diagram-maker
entries.description: Create SVG/HTML or Excalidraw diagrams for concepts, architecture, flows, and whiteboards.

entries.name: frontend-architecture
entries.description: Design scalable frontend architecture for large applications: project structure, module boundaries, dependency management, code splitting strategy, and technical debt prevention. Use when starting a new project, refactoring an existing one, or making tech stack decisions.

entries.name: gh-issues
entries.description: Fetch GitHub issues, select candidates, spawn background fix agents, open PRs, and optionally process PR review comments.

entries.name: github
entries.description: GitHub CLI for issues, PRs, CI/check logs, comments, reviews, releases, repos, and gh api queries.

entries.name: healthcheck
entries.description: Audit/harden OpenClaw hosts: SSH, firewall, updates, exposure, backups, disk encryption, gateway security.

entries.name: himalaya
entries.description: Himalaya CLI for IMAP/SMTP mail: list, read, search, compose, reply, forward, copy, move, delete.

entries.name: meme-maker
entries.description: Search meme templates, suggest formats, and generate local or hosted image memes.

entries.name: node-connect
entries.description: Diagnose OpenClaw Android, iOS, or macOS node pairing, QR/setup code, route, auth, and connection failures.

entries.name: node-inspect-debugger
entries.description: Debug Node.js with node inspect, --inspect, breakpoints, CDP, heap, and CPU profiles.

entries.name: notion
entries.description: Notion CLI/API for pages, Markdown content, data sources, files, comments, search, Workers, and raw API calls.

entries.name: olympus
entries.description: Lineage tracking and operational observability for agent orchestration. Use when spawning sub-agents, tracking parent-child execution trees, auditing who spawned what, or diagnosing orchestration flow visibility issues.

entries.name: openclaw-hygiene
entries.description: Audit and maintain OpenClaw runtime hygiene: cron live health, model fallback strictness, session/archive cleanup, workspace context budget, and config drift.

entries.name: python-debugpy
entries.description: Debug Python with pdb, breakpoint(), post-mortem inspection, and debugpy remote attach.

entries.name: sessions-archive-janitor
entries.description: Archive old OpenClaw sessions and prune orphan/media/cron-runs files inside the container. Use when running scheduled or manual cleanup of $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR to reduce boot load and disk usage. Default mode is dry-run; nothing is moved or deleted unless --apply is passed.

entries.name: skill-creator
entries.description: Create, edit, audit, tidy, validate, or restructure AgentSkills and SKILL.md files.

entries.name: software-development-workflow
entries.description: Standard software delivery workflow for OpenClaw agents. Use when planning, implementing, reviewing, and validating software tasks with consistent role assignment, model selection, QA gates, and escalation paths.

entries.name: spike
entries.description: Run throwaway prototypes to validate feasibility, compare approaches, and report a verdict.

entries.name: taskflow
entries.description: Coordinate multi-step detached tasks as one durable TaskFlow job with owner context, state, waits, and child tasks.

entries.name: taskflow-inbox-triage
entries.description: Example TaskFlow pattern for inbox triage, intent routing, waiting on replies, and later summaries.

entries.name: trello-protocol
entries.description: Standard Trello operating protocol for agency workflows. Use when creating, moving, reviewing, or closing Trello cards; enforcing labels and lifecycle states; and applying consistent board hygiene rules across teams.

entries.name: weather
entries.description: Current weather and forecasts with wttr.in via curl for locations, rain, temperature, travel planning.

entries.name: workspace-hygiene
entries.description: Audit and optimize an OpenClaw workspace to eliminate context bottlenecks (event loop starvation from oversized injected system-prompt files). Use when MEMORY.md/SOUL.md/USER.md/AGENTS.md grow large, when daily notes accumulate, when local repos pile up, or when assembly time feels slow. Multi-agent-safe by default. Does NOT cover Trello, credentials, or skill content.

prompting.skillsPrompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.
